title: Domain Admins Group Enumeration via net group
description: Detects enumeration of high-value domain groups (Domain Admins, Enterprise Admins) using 'net group /domain'. Standard early-stage AD recon to map privileged accounts before targeting them.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*group*' and 'Command Line' like '*/domain*')) and (('Command Line' like '*Domain Admins*' or 'Command Line' like '*Enterprise Admins*' or 'Command Line' like '*Domain Controllers*' or 'Command Line' like '*Schema Admins*')))
